title: Know More: Your first time could be your last time - Canada.ca
content:
## Know More: Your first time could be your last time
Download the alternative format (PDF format, 1.0 MB, 1 page)
Organization: Health Canada
Date published: 2018

## Your first time    could be your last time
Teens are overdosing from street drugs like    ecstasy/MDMA, heroin, oxycodone, and cocaine that have been laced with deadly    amounts of fentanyl.
Know the risks. As little as a few grains of salt worth    of fentanyl can kill.
Drugs: Get the facts. Know the risks.
